overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a rainy neon-lit urban plaza at night. The camera slowly rotates counter-clockwise around a distinctive circular building with a large holographic billboard, descending gradually as it navigates past surrounding skyscrapers. Heavy rain and atmospheric fog create a moody cyberpunk aesthetic with vibrant neon reflections on wet streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular urban plaza with elevated monorail

agents.ego_description: slowly rotating drone camera descending around the plaza, surveying the cyberpunk cityscape from high altitude

notable_agents.action: flying car passing above the street between buildings

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular structure with distinctive red neon lighting around each level
large cylindrical rotating billboard displaying bright advertisements atop the plaza building
elevated transit track crossing horizontally above the plaza
tall building facade covered in vertical neon signage and illuminated windows
rain-slicked roads reflecting the vibrant neon lights in multiple colors

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night. The camera slowly rotates around a distinctive circular building topped with a massive holographic billboard, while heavy rain creates reflective surfaces on the multi-lane streets below. Neon signs illuminate the surrounding skyscrapers as a flying vehicle passes in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon between plaza and surrounding towers

events.description: camera descends significantly lower, bringing street level details into clearer view
camera passes extremely close to a dark skyscraper on the right, temporarily blocking much of the plaza view

agents.ego_description: descending drone navigating through the urban canyon, passing close to the right-side building facade

entered.detail: tall dark building facade with minimal lighting that temporarily fills the right side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its descent and rotation, moving into the urban canyon between structures. As it drops lower, a large dark skyscraper on the right gradually occludes the view, creating a brief tunnel-like effect before the building passes. The plaza building recedes into the distance while street-level neon becomes more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower angle view of circular intersection with street-level details

events.description: camera emerges from behind the occluding building, revealing the plaza from a new lower vantage point

agents.ego_description: continuing slow rotation at lower altitude, capturing street-level traffic and pedestrian details

notable_agents.action: ground vehicle driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: ground level storefronts and entrances with bright neon signage becoming clearly visible
zebra crossing markings on the wet asphalt with pedestrians walking

segments.scene_description: Having passed the occluding building, the camera reveals the plaza from a lower, more intimate angle. Street-level details including shopfronts, crosswalks, and ground traffic become visible. The circular building remains the focal point while the camera continues its slow rotation, capturing the vibrant neon reflections on the rain-soaked streets and the steady flow of vehicles through the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous descending rotation that transforms a high-altitude aerial view of a futuristic plaza into an intimate, street-level perspective of a neon-lit urban canyon. It begins high above the city, circling a distinctive circular building topped with a massive holographic billboard while heavy rain creates shimmering reflections on the multi-lane streets below. As the camera drops lower into the urban corridor, a large dark skyscraper on the right briefly occludes the view, creating a tunnel-like effect that shifts the focus toward the glowing street-level neon. The scene then opens up as the camera clears the building, revealing the plaza from a lower angle where shopfronts, crosswalks, and ground traffic become clearly visible. Finally, the camera continues its slow rotation around the central circular building, capturing the steady flow of vehicles through the rain-soaked intersection.
